allow: Bash(node -e "const { PrismaClient } = require\(''@prisma/client''\); const prisma = new PrismaClient\(\); prisma.user.findMany\({ select: { UserID: true, UserName: true, Role: true, CreatedAt: true } }\).then\(u => console.log\(JSON.stringify\(u, null, 2\)\)\).finally\(\(\) => prisma.$disconnect\(\)\)")
